summary: Quick Edit Feature Testing Complete - All features working correctly for both Midwife and Doula contracts. Quick Edit button appears only for Draft contracts, form shows all required fields, balance auto-calculates, Save updates via PUT API successfully, Cancel returns to preview mode.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Quick Edit UI features verified

seed_data_creation: Created Draft Doula contract (contract_a217bd169908) for testing Quick Edit
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Edit feature fully tested and working for both Midwife and Doula roles. Test credentials: Midwife (testmidwife@test.com / password123), Doula (marketplace_doula@test.com / password123)

features_tested.midwife_quick_edit_button_draft: PASS - Quick Edit button visible in preview modal for Draft contracts
features_tested.midwife_quick_edit_button_signed: PASS - Quick Edit button NOT shown for Signed contracts
features_tested.midwife_quick_edit_button_sent: PASS - Quick Edit button NOT shown for Sent contracts
features_tested.midwife_quick_edit_form_fields: PASS - All editable fields present: client name, partner, due date, birth location, fees, balance, on-call window, special arrangements
features_tested.midwife_quick_edit_auto_calc: PASS - Remaining balance auto-calculates when fee/retainer changes (3500-800=2700)
features_tested.midwife_quick_edit_save: PASS - Save updates contract via PUT API successfully
features_tested.midwife_quick_edit_cancel: PASS - Cancel returns to preview mode without saving
features_tested.doula_quick_edit_button_draft: PASS - Quick Edit button visible in preview modal for Draft contracts
features_tested.doula_quick_edit_button_sent: PASS - Quick Edit button NOT shown for Sent contracts
features_tested.doula_quick_edit_form_fields: PASS - All Doula-specific fields present: client name, due date, fees, prenatal visits, on-call window, postpartum visits, special arrangements
features_tested.doula_quick_edit_save: PASS - Save updates contract via PUT API successfully

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/auth/login - Authentication for midwife and doula
PUT /api/midwife/contracts/{id} - Update midwife contract (Quick Edit Save)
PUT /api/doula/contracts/{id} - Update doula contract (Quick Edit Save)

quick_edit_behavior.draft_contracts: Quick Edit button appears at bottom of preview modal
quick_edit_behavior.signed_contracts: Quick Edit button does NOT appear (correct)
quick_edit_behavior.sent_contracts: Quick Edit button does NOT appear (correct)
quick_edit_behavior.form_title: Modal title changes to 'Quick Edit' when form is active
quick_edit_behavior.cancel_action: Returns to Contract Preview without saving changes
quick_edit_behavior.save_action: Calls PUT API to update contract, closes modal, refreshes list
quick_edit_behavior.balance_calculation: Remaining Balance = Total Fee - Retainer Amount (auto-updates on field change)
